text: It feels as if I am tucked away in a quiet, forgotten lab late at night. The glow of terminals and green-tinted industrial lighting evoke a mix of solitude and intrigue. The dimness sharpens my awareness of the space—every small sound would be amplified here. There is a sense of unspoken potential and a quiet, restful anticipation, as if something meaningful could emerge from the silence and ambient hum of machines.
